lessons.title: I Have a Pet
lessons.topic: Cat, Dog, Bird and the I like pattern

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: Which pet chases the ball and barks?
Which pet likes to sing and tweet?
Which pet purrs and loves milk?

steps.title: Tom's Pets
steps.text: Tom has a pet. It is a cat. Tom says, 'I like my cat.' The cat is with a bird. Do you like birds?

questions.question: What does Tom say about his cat?

steps.explanation: Say 'I like' to talk about pets you love.

steps.audio_text: I have a cat. She likes to sleep. Do you like cats?

questions.question_text: What is a pet you keep at home?
I like ___. (Vocabulary question)
Which animal can fly?
True or False: I like cats.
Which sentence is correct?

lessons.title: I Don't Like...
lessons.topic: Rabbit, Mouse, Turtle and negative preference

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: Which pet likes to hop and eat carrots?
questions.hint: It hops and has long ears!

questions.question_text: What small pet makes a squeaky sound and likes cheese?
questions.hint: It's small and often seen in cartoons!

questions.question_text: Which animal carries its home on its back?
questions.hint: It has a hard shell and moves slowly!

steps.title: Turtle's Friends
steps.text: Look! A turtle is slow. I don't like the mouse. I like the rabbit. The rabbit jumps high.

steps.explanation: Use 'I like' for things you enjoy.

steps.audio_text: I like turtles and rabbits, but I don't like mice. Does your sister like rabbits?

questions.question: What animal does she not like?

questions.question_text: Which animal hops and likes carrots? (Vocabulary question)
I don't like ___. (Grammar question)
What animal does John say he doesn't like? (Reading comprehension question)
True or False: A turtle can hop. (Comprehension question)

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: Which animal can you hear barking? 🐶
questions.hint: This pet loves to fetch and has a wagging tail!

questions.question_text: Which pet loves to swim in a small tank? 🐡
questions.hint: It's a small, colorful animal that swims a lot!

questions.question_text: Which animal loves to purr when you pet it? 🐱
questions.hint: It has soft fur and sleek whiskers, and loves to nap!

steps.title: Splash the Fish
steps.text: Do you like water? Splash the fish does! Splash is in the pond. I like Splash because it is cute. Do you like Splash?

steps.explanation: Use this to say what you enjoy.

steps.audio_text: Do you like cute, colorful fish? Yes, I think they are very pretty swimming in the water!

questions.question: Are the fish in the water?
Why do I like the fish?

questions.question_text: Fill in the blank: Do you like ___ fish?
What can fish do?
True or False: Fish live in water.
What question can you ask about likes?

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: Which pet has long ears and hops?
questions.hint: This pet loves to chew carrots!

questions.question_text: Which pet purrs and likes to climb trees?
questions.hint: This pet loves to play with yarn!

questions.question_text: Which pet runs on a wheel for exercise?
questions.hint: This pet is small and loves to nibble seeds!

steps.title: Pets and Preferences
steps.text: My name is Mia. I like dogs and fish. I have one big dog. I don't like snakes. Do you like fish? Yes, I do!

questions.question: Does Mia have a big dog?

steps.audio_text: I have a big orange cat. His name is Whiskers. I like feeding him fish.

steps.prompt: Tell me one pet you like and one pet you don't like. You can say: I like cats, I don't like frogs.
steps.expected_text: i like cats i don't like frogs

questions.question_text: I ___ like dogs. (Grammar question)
What pet can fly? (Vocabulary question)
True or False: Dogs can swim. (Reading comprehension question)
What does Ben like? 'I like cats.'
Do you like turtles? (Grammar pattern question)
